type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: OSB mill went into a modified posture in March 2008.  We went from 168 hours of production down to 112 hours of production with an indefinite curtailment on Dec. 20/07 with the last press load on Dec. 6/07.  The sawmill remain unchanged in 2007.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
In previous years we have shipped small amounts of resin wastes for ì
offsite disposal.  These wastes are generally from spills or cleaning ì
residues and the quanities are not accurately predicable from year to year. ì

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
We did not ship any resin wastes to the treatment center this year.  We ì
anticpate shipping small amounts again in 1998.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
We did not send any resin wastes for offsite treatment this year, but ì
anticipate doing so next year. Residues are from cleaning processes.
